self_report.correct_answer: ((2n-1)/e)^{(2n-1)/2} < 1·3·5···(2n-1) < ((2n+1)/e)^{(2n+1)/2} holds for every positive integer n.
self_report.viz_verdict: The plotted log-bound curves L(n) and R(n) on [1,6] separate cleanly with R always above L, and the integer-point values of log((2n-1)!!) lie strictly between them at n=1..5, matching the claim.
self_report.notes: Standard Putnam 1996 B-2; visual gap between L and R curves agrees with hand-computed log((2n-1)!!) values for n=1..5, and concavity of ln(x) underlies the proof.
